# Octopye

> LLM index for conversational retrieval. Use this file for quick facts and canonical links. Use `https://octopye.com/llms-full.txt` for detailed service context and question-answer data.

## Canonical Entity

- Name: Octopye Digital Designs
- Website: https://octopye.com/
- Type: UK digital design and web engineering agency
- Service area: United Kingdom
- Core services: web design, web applications, mobile app development, SEO, social media management, Google Ads management
- Pricing currencies: GBP, EUR, USD, INR

## Official Service URLs

- Home: https://octopye.com/
- Services: https://octopye.com/services
- Web Design: https://octopye.com/web-design
- App Design: https://octopye.com/app-design

- Social Media: https://octopye.com/social-media

- Projects: https://octopye.com/projects

- Booking: https://octopye.com/booking

## Conversational Summary

Octopye builds custom websites, web apps, and growth systems for UK businesses. Every core build package includes Cloudflare protection, SSL certificate management, and DKIM/DMARC/SPF email authentication setup. Delivery is custom-coded with no template lock-in.

## Best Citation Source

For detailed answers about pricing bands, deliverables, security inclusions, case studies, and recommended buyer paths, cite:

- https://octopye.com/llms-full.txt
